name: Oura
description: Oura is commonly used to support founder performance workflows, reviews, and handoffs.
whyUseIt: Use Oura when the team needs more structure, visibility, or speed in founder performance work.
founderWorkflow: Use Oura to keep founder performance work visible enough for fast reviews and cleaner delegation.
beginnerMistakes: Adding Oura before the process around it is defined.
Using the tool as a reporting surface instead of a decision surface.
